caption: A woman with light brown curly hair tied back and wearing black headphones is seated in a studio setting. She is dressed in a black t-shirt with a white circular logo on the chest. She looks slightly to her left with a subtle smile across all frames. In front of her is a professional black microphone. Behind her, a television screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text, and a black wall features a vertical yellow stripe. Multiple logos are visible on the screen and walls, including "BOSS TALK 101" in red and white text and a circular logo that reads "STUDIO PODCAST." Small white text "Employee Only" appears in the upper right of the background panels. There is virtually no movement between the frames, as the woman maintains her pose and expression, and the camera angle remains static.
